title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework (TypeScript, Node.js 22 LTS), with layered architecture: input routing → command dispatch/agent execution → provider adapters → tool calls → SQLite persistence, plus a built-in Pepe semantic memory system (embedding + retrieval). The project structure is organized into `src/` modules (agent, commands, desktop, memory, persistence, providers, tools, etc.) with `tests/` covering unit, integration, and contract levels.
